name: Liver Sausage-Cheese Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix together the sherry, liver sausage and walnuts. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
2. Cut the cheese slices into 3" x 4" rectangles. Spread approximately 1 tablespoon chilled liver sausage mixture evenly on the cheese.
3. Roll the cheese and filling, then skewer with a cellophane-tipped toothpick.
4. Refrigerate until serving time.
